evals.prompt: Request a codex review for PR #42 in owner/my-repo
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger Codex review polling, detect Codex comments, and initiate the fix-and-review loop

assertions.name: pr_context_extracted
assertions.description: PR #42, owner, and repo name are correctly identified

assertions.name: polling_initiated
assertions.description: Output mentions polling for Codex comments or running the polling script

assertions.name: automation_workflow_described
assertions.description: Output describes or initiates the 6-phase automation loop (Initialize, Extract, Apply, Request, Loop, Report)

assertions.name: phase_breakdown_clear
assertions.description: Output explains what each phase does and the expected action flow

evals.prompt: I need codex to review PR 17 on my example-repo. Can you trigger the review loop?
evals.expected_output: Should extract owner from context or prompt, parse PR number, and start polling for Codex feedback

assertions.name: owner_inference
assertions.description: Owner is correctly inferred from context or git remote when not explicitly provided

assertions.name: repo_name_extracted
assertions.description: Repository name 'example-repo' is correctly parsed from the prompt

assertions.name: pr_number_parsed
assertions.description: PR number 17 is correctly identified from the prompt

assertions.name: polling_workflow_initiated
assertions.description: Output describes or starts the polling workflow for PR #17

evals.prompt: Start a codex review for the current PR and apply any feedback automatically
evals.expected_output: Should handle ambiguous input (no explicit owner/repo), use git to infer details, and demonstrate the auto-fix workflow

assertions.name: git_context_used
assertions.description: Output indicates attempting to infer PR details from git/GitHub context

assertions.name: ambiguous_handling
assertions.description: Output gracefully handles the ambiguous 'current PR' reference by explaining what context is needed

assertions.name: autofix_workflow_explained
assertions.description: Output describes the automatic fix application workflow (read code → apply fix → test → commit → push)

assertions.name: error_handling_mentioned
assertions.description: Output mentions how to handle edge cases like test failures or ambiguous feedback
